package.title: Synthetic FISMA Agency Security Plan Excerpt
package.prepared_for: Portal demo — not official authorization evidence

system.name: Customer Records Portal
system.description: Internal web application for agency case management and customer correspondence.
system.authorization_boundary: Single VPC with managed PostgreSQL and object storage

AC-1.summary: Access control policy reviewed annually and published on the agency intranet.

AC-2.summary: Account provisioning uses group-based RBAC; quarterly access review cadence is documented.

IA-5.summary: Authenticator management enforced through the agency IdP with MFA for privileged users.

agency_security_plan.attestation: Synthetic excerpt for local intake and deterministic analysis only.
